reason: Verify v2 syntax, region, no forbidden patterns, no console.* logging in the new code.
Verify Firestore writes use the correct apps/gitsync/repos/{repoId}/pullRequests/{n} path, idempotency check honored, type-strict queries on the users collection.
Verify webhook HMAC + x-github-delivery idempotency reused, and the new flow swallows Discord/LLM errors without losing the Firestore write.
Verify new tests follow the project's jest/ts-jest + nock + getOpenAI mock pattern.
Verify all new logging goes through firebase-functions structured logger.
Verify no duplicate Discord/GitHub helpers were created; tools/discordNotify.ts and services/githubClient.ts are reused.
Triage data crosses webhook → flow → Firestore → Discord — verify the data contract is consistent at every layer (especially the pullRequests/{n} schema additions).
